content.en:
In the blink of an eye.

Ye Tian and Mo Chen fought with the Lord of Corrosion.

Thundered!!!

One of the avatars of the Lord of Corrosion was shattered by Ye Tian and Mo Chen, but the power of these avatars was integrated into the other avatars, making the other avatars stronger and stronger.

"Creation Devouring Domain!"

Ye Tian performed this trick and directly absorbed the power of the incarnation of the Lord of Corrosion, which made most of the power intercepted by Ye Tian after the incarnation of the Lord of Corrosion fell, causing the strength of other incarnations to not be able to improve.

It can be said that after the Extreme Devouring Domain's Extreme Perfection Control Technique was unleashed, this move of the Lord of Corrosion was nullified.

Suddenly, the avatar of the Lord of Corruption vanished, and all his power was concentrated on the main body of the Lord of Corrosion.

The next moment.

The true body of the Lord of Corrosion descended, facing Ye Tian and Mo Chen.

Without saying a word, they fought directly.

I have to say that the strength of the Lord of Corrosion is not weak, even if he fights against Ye Tian and Mo Chen, he can remain undefeated.

Ye Tian didn't fully display his full strength, because he sensed that something was wrong.

Although the strength of the Lord of Corrosion is stronger than Mo Chen, Mo Chen will not be severely injured to the point of needing to sleep, with the strength of the Lord of Corrosion, even if Mo Chen is invincible, there is no problem in escaping.

But the result was that Mochen had been sleeping for countless years, obviously encountering an irresistible enemy, and the difference in strength was incomparably huge.

If he only encountered an enemy like the Lord of Corrosion, Mo Chen didn't need his help at all.

After all, Mochen has a will clone and an ontology, and it is not a problem to use the will clone to drag the corrupt lord and find resources by himself.

So, Mochen was hiding something.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai did not show his full strength.

After a long time, the Lord of Corrosion stopped.

"Your strength is very strong, there is no point in continuing to fight, let's make peace!"

The Lord of Corrosion spoke.

Mo Chen immediately stopped and said, "Okay, then let's talk peacefully!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian also stopped.

The peace talks were mainly between the Lord of Corrosion and Mo Chen, and Mo Chen put forward some demands, and the Lord of Corrosion hesitated for a moment and agreed to some of the conditions.

In the end, the peace talks were successfully completed, and everything seemed to be going well.

And the result of the peace talks was that Ye Tian and Mo Chen could find resources in the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void, and several treasures in the seventh layer of the void also allowed them to enter it to practice.

However, Ye Tian and Mo Chen could not disturb the Lord of Corrosion.

......

"Ye Tian, let's go, let's go find resources!"

Mo Chen urged.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the two of them began to search for resources in the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Creatures of the Rim like the Lord of Corruption almost always stay here and never go out, so it doesn't have the idea of gathering resources to trade with other creatures.

Therefore, he didn't bother to collect resources that were of no value to him.

Because of this, there are still a lot of resources in the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian found a lot of resources.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed the breath of the Extreme Substance.

"Underworld Golden Fruit!"

Ye Tian came to the front of a golden fruit, this Underworld Golden Fruit is a kind of extremely powerful substance, but the grade is weaker than the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, but the value is still very high.

In the following days, Ye Tian found several kinds of pole-making substances, but the number was not much.

Subsequently, Ye Tian did not find more pole-making substances.

In this regard, Ye Tian was not disappointed.

After all, if a random treasure land has a large amount of extremely powerful substances, then it is not normal!

This time, Ye Tian's harvest was not small, but it was not an amazing harvest.

"Ye Tian, it's time for us to go to the eighth layer of the void! The Lord of Corrosion contacted me before, and he wanted to join forces with us to enter the eighth layer to deal with his old opponent. His old rival is stronger than him, he's not an opponent, and he wants to join forces with us. The cultivation environment of the eighth layer is better, he wants to occupy the eighth layer!" Mo Chen came to Ye Tian and said.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

But in fact, Ye Tian was extremely vigilant in his heart.

He had long sensed that there was something wrong with Mochen, but it wasn't a problem.

But at this moment, Ye Tian suddenly realized that the real problem might be on the eighth layer.

"Mo Chen has definitely been to the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, maybe he was hit the eighth layer!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This possibility is not non-existent, but very likely.

If ordinary people harvest so many treasures, they may be lost, and they will even trust Mochen, but Ye Tian has always been extremely vigilant and will not trust people casually.

Soon.

Ye Tian and Mo Chen met with the Lord of Corrosion again.

"Two friends, with the combat power of your Four Pavilions Perfect Controller, I can definitely easily crush that old opponent of the Eighth Layer Void. The Lord of Corrosion said happily.

Soon, Ye Tian and the others entered the eighth layer of the void.

Just after entering the eighth layer of the void, the Lord of Corrosion and Mo Chen actually took out a leaf for the first time, stimulating the power of the leaf.

Then, a terrifying aura came.

In the next moment, a pair of pupils locked on Ye Tian.

【Nameless Kun】

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed the talent of this creature and knew its origin.

"It turned out to be a nameless kun, the lord of corruption said that it was not a nameless kun at all, he lied to me!"

Ye Tian realized that it was not only the Lord of Corrosion who deceived him, but Mo Chen definitely belonged to one of them.

And just now, the Lord of Corrosion and Mo Chen used a special treasure at the same time, I am afraid that it is to avoid being locked by the nameless kun, and he is the cannon fodder that has been chosen.

At this moment, he completely understood.

Mochen had definitely been hit hard by the Nameless Kun, and he and the Lord of Corrosion were not enemies at all, but allies.

Rumble!!!

The nameless kun descended and killed Ye Tian.

Now.

Mo Chen was extremely excited: "It's successful, the Nameless Kun is very weird, it will only choose the opponent who is locked at the first time to attack, if it is a cultivator who is too weak, it will not be able to compete with the Nameless Kun at all, and there is no chance to delay time." Neither the Lord of Corrosion nor I want to be cannon fodder, so we can only let Ye Tian, a fool, be the one. Ye Tian's strength is not weak, he can definitely hold off the nameless kun for a while, the nameless kun will release the nameless mist, and it will be difficult for Ye Tian to escape. He must fight the Nameless Kun to stall for us. Hahaha, when we take the treasure here immediately, we will definitely thank you!"

"Mochen, get the treasure quickly, don't waste time!"

The Lord of Corrosion said coldly.

If it weren't for the special contract signed with Mochen, he wouldn't have cooperated with Mochen honestly!

However, in the next moment, both Mochen and the Lord of Corrosion were stunned.

I saw that Ye Tian did not resist, and the copy body and the will clone took the initiative to let the nameless kun swallow it in one bite, and there was no battle at all.

Then.

The Nameless Kun turned his head, his pupils fixed on Mochen and the Lord of Corrosion.
